chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-7604 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.28317/2024. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of Main Case. 24.12.2024 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Addl. A.G., Sindh. Despite repeated requests, the petitioner in person remains unable to establish locus standi to maintain this Petition. The Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, stands dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE M.Khan
